subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received through the intermediary of his honor the Trustee, and its contents were clear and readily understood [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما بواسطه جناب امین وصول یافت از مضمون واضح و مفهوم بود
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
